reviews.title: Good prompt service
reviews.body: Although there was a lot of security to get though, the staff at Skipton do this in an efficient and polite manner. You're not waiting on hold for ever, or just left talking to a bot.Understandable that security is high and they give confidence that they are a secure organisation.

reviews.title: Very helpful staff member
reviews.body: Based on my experience (making a large withdrawal to move house, having problems online), the person I spoke to was really helpful and pleasant, I couldn't rate her highly enough. If everyone was that helpful when you are moving house, life would be so easy!This is the first time I've needed to telephone, I'm very impressed, thank you!

reviews.title: Excellent customer after care
reviews.body: I discovered a serious problem re the opening of two new ISA's.Theresa, call centre, was outstandingly helpful and understanding and sort resolution to my problem. Skipton is blessed to have this lady working for them. Thank you

reviews.title: Great website
reviews.body: Great website, better than some of the big banking institutions.

reviews.title: A great service with real people you can talk too!
reviews.body: Helps that you can see things online and chat is with real people!

reviews.title: Maturity Letter-online help
reviews.body: A maturity letter was sent which was a bit confusing but the online chat lady(Annie) was very helpful and I was able to sort things out with her much more easily than I was expecting

reviews.title: Such lovely helpful people.
reviews.body: Such lovely helpful people.No pressure... Actively listened to our requirements... A good experience.

reviews.title: Your member of staff was so helpful
reviews.body: Your member of staff was so helpful. I have MS and sometimes my fingers are all over the place and I can make mistakes but she helped me through the process.

reviews.title: Inefficient and frustrating
reviews.body: Skipton owe me interest on my maturing ISA.  I have been chasing this for three weeks.  I have dealt with 8 or more agents - all of whom give different excuses and different solutions.  They now say they need a further 7 days to sort it out.  Ridiculous.

reviews.title: adam made everthing so easy
reviews.body: adam made everthing so easy and was quick too

reviews.title: Fast and easy 0% deposit Mortgage for First Time Buyers!
reviews.body: The entire process from getting Mortgage Agreement in Principle to getting the final approval went extremely smooth and fast. We are First Time buyers and we went for a 0% deposit mortage and managed to get our property very fast, with credit checks and interview process very straight forward. Bonus points, Skipton also sent us a care package to our new house with very nice goodies!Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Thank you
reviews.body: Thank you, Skipton, for having such professionals as Lauren  Lund She gave me professional support and guidance throughout the process, and I truly appreciate her dedication, excellent client service, and the way she handled everything so smoothly.

reviews.title: Terrible to find you way around the website
reviews.body: The website is OK to make deposits but withdrawals are another matter. It's not user friendly and trying to find things is really difficult. Also they have limits on the amount you can withdraw and you have to call them with anything substantial.Furthermore they entice you with good savings rates at the outset but on maturity the new rates drop like a stone. Now taken most of my savings out - find much better rates elsewhere.

reviews.title: You bothered me with an unnecessary…
reviews.body: You bothered me with an unnecessary email but your chat adviser was easy to use and very helpful

reviews.title: Thank you so much for the box of…
reviews.body: Thank you so much for the box of goodies that arrived today.  It was totally unexpected.  Our experience has been excellent with Skipton.  We have been kept informed every step of the way.  I would highly recommend them.

reviews.title: Transferred cash ISA from another…
reviews.body: Transferred cash ISA from another provider, Skipton offering very competitive interest rates over 3 years.  Transaction was easy to carry out on line. I'm very pleased

reviews.title: There communication with repayments…
reviews.body: There communication with repayments have been great and the app is so easy to use. We moved in about a month ago now and we got a lovely moving in parcel with little treats and moving essentials with we thought was a really nice touch.

reviews.title: Frustratingly poor service
reviews.body: I am an elderly technophobe but have generally become more confident in using on line banking.I opened an online savings account which has worked very well regarding making deposits. However transferring out is a different matter. I have been trying to set up an on line procedure since March! First I am told I need the app, so far so good and it worked, I have both made deposits and withdrawn. However, I don't feel secure carrying an app with me on my phone and want to uninstall it and use a passcode system on my PC as with other banks etc. I made the enquiry, was sent a letter by post to select a memorable word. Then I got an email telling me I had opted for electronic statements which I had absolutely not!On the phone again and I am told I cannot transfer funds out online as I am not registered. Next I go into the app which tells me my 6 digit passcode was not recognised! It then invited me to re register. I put in the same 6 digit passcode which it accepted but wouldn't let me any further, apparently until I get a confirmation letter with (I think) a code or other security measure.It is late November and was March when I first began asking how to withdraw funds. I have withdrawn via the app before it was was disabled. What do I do now?I have sung the praises of SBS to friends in the past, but will not be doing further business unless this gets sorted quicklyRobert Little

reviews.title: Website Help
reviews.body: Adam Helped me straight away on chat to get my problem sorted

reviews.title: This company is very good
reviews.body: This company is very good

reviews.title: Friendly, very competent and reassuring.
reviews.body: Really friendly and made me feel comfortable revisiting questions they had already answered so I could be sure I had my facts right.

reviews.title: I’m feeling quite disappointed with…
reviews.body: I’m feeling quite disappointed with Skipton at the moment. Their turnaround times consistently aren’t being met and this delay may now result in us losing our buyer. We are still waiting for a simple confirmation from them, yet it seems to be taking far longer than expected.When we call to explain that the matter is urgent and outline what is at stake, we’re told there is nothing they can do to assist, which is incredibly frustrating given the circumstances.

reviews.title: Friendly and helpful
reviews.body: The online chat service was friendly and informative and gave all the right information and help. Phone service was also fantastic. Very pleased.

reviews.title: Appalling service on website and by phone
reviews.body: All I need is the interest on my mortgage so I can complete my 24/25 tax return.Not available on their website??? Online chat - we will send a secure email.  Tried logging in with email address and password.  Skipton password didn't  work - what's it asking for?  Phoned - what password is it wanting?  Don't want to put in my googledrive password?  It's your secure messaging password- never set up a password for whatever this is??  She just kept repeating - it's your secure messaging password.  Clicked fo a reset link to be forwarded to my email.  It has forwarded mimecast asking me to download and get a quote??? It feels like a scam? I asked them to post the interest figure a few weeks ago - still not received it.  Tax return not getting done anytime soon!!

reviews.title: payment clarification
reviews.body: yes agent very helpful

reviews.title: I was looking to make a withdrawal from…
reviews.body: I was looking to make a withdrawal from is skiptons Lisa and I was amazed with the service provided by Adam he was extremely professional and made me feel very comfortable

reviews.title: Asked to transfer a maturing ISA into a…
reviews.body: Asked to transfer a maturing ISA into a new one on maturity and was given confirmation. On maturity transferred into another new ISA (do nothing option) but assured transfer would take place in about 5 days. 6 days later webchat was ended 'for security reasons' with being advised to ring Head Office. Then told by HO that transfer would not take place because new ISA was closed to transfers on October 30th.

reviews.title: Very disappointed with the member of…
reviews.body: Very disappointed with the member of staff that handled my enquiry this morning. Her tone of voice suggested she was disinterested and made no apologies for the issues that I had experienced. Although she resolved the concern she did not make me feel that I was a valued customer in any way. Maybe if I had significant sums in my accounts she may have had a different tone, but I would suggest their would be some learning for her that my concerns are genuine concerns, no matter how simple, trivial or easy they might have been for her to have resolved them.

reviews.title: Kafkaesque online service
reviews.body: Complex and difficult to access your online account - almost Kafkaesque. you cannot change your phone number without a One Time Code but you can't get an OTC without a text. So if your phone number has changed you cant receive an OTC so you cant change your phone number - and so in ever decreasing circles.nowhere in the whole process were our contact details checked when we were opening an online account (we had an old existing account).We were also told to go into a branch to change the phone number - there is no branch for miles.

reviews.title: Happy with the service
reviews.body: Very good service clear advice which is very important

reviews.title: Skipton have been amazing
reviews.body: Skipton have been amazing! Buying my first house and couldn’t be happier with the process. They also sent me a gift box with lots of treats, and necessities for a new home, which was very lovely 😊Thank you Skipton

reviews.title: Quick and clean support
reviews.body: Thank you so much to Shama for providing fast, friendly and efficient support. The only faults were me forgetting my own password!

reviews.title: Super fast, and real-person communication
reviews.body: Really quick to get the information I required, and amazingly was immediately interacting with real people, not some AI/bot that is unable to understand the question. I got more information than I expected and really useful advice. Perfect.

reviews.title: A good experience
reviews.body: Query answered very swiftly by online chat.  No delays or waiting on a phoneline.  I was also politely reminded of their free consultation service for investors, with advice available on inheritance, tax and investment queries.

reviews.title: Online account assistance
reviews.body: I was struggling with my online account and needed to phone the customer help desk.  A lovely girl called Abigail helped me out with warmth and patience.  Thank you

reviews.title: We are very happy bought our new home …
reviews.body: We are very happy bought our new home  through  Skipton building society throughout process stress free movement.

reviews.title: Excellent service and little gifts
reviews.body: They very prompt and patient with the house sale going through. No hassle or pressure to buy a mortgage with them, they offered us a delayed start mortgage which is amazing for first time buyers. The interest rate isn’t the best out there but the service thus far has been great! Then we received this gift pack!! A magazine, tea, coffee, chocolates, hand wash, cleaning products and a pack of assorted nails. Gorgeous and thoughtful. Put a smile on our faces after a stressful move.

reviews.title: Instant answer to question
reviews.body: I had my question answered very quickly and efficiently

reviews.title: Skipton App not customer friendly
reviews.body: Skipton App not customer friendly, but Kendal branch staff helpful and efficient.

reviews.title: easy access to information
reviews.body: It was easy to contact Skipton and get what I needed

reviews.title: My experience with skipton building…
reviews.body: My experience with skipton building society has been nothing but excellent all round. It’s been hassle free process from start to finish. I couldn’t have asked for anything better. All round the best I have dealt with. Now I’m considering taking out more business with them.

reviews.title: Skipton were brilliant
reviews.body: Skipton were great with explaining the different types of mortgages and never forcefully pushed any add-ons on to us. They were easy to work with and had great communication. They even sent us a lovely box of goodies once we had completed on our new house.

reviews.title: Agent intersaction
reviews.body: The agent answered my questions clearly and meaningfully.  I was able to confirm my understanding of the account process and plan my next investment.

reviews.title: Skipton BS
reviews.body: Skipton is very easy to deal with, excellent customer service, competative products and interest Rates, Really good online and App service which is important to me .

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.body: Jasmine was patient, helpful and knowledgeable.

reviews.title: Concise friendly advice
reviews.body: Reply from Skipton Building Society

reviews.title: Excellent all round attitude from a…
reviews.body: Excellent all round attitude from a very knowledgeable and friendly staff.

reviews.title: Locked out of account
reviews.body: Reply from Skipton Building Society

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.body: You have made our dreams come true! There was a hiccup with the underwriters which was very stressful at the time but now we’re moved in it feels all worth it! Thank you for the thoughtful goodie gift box.

reviews.title: I asked a bout setting up a new ISA and…
reviews.body: I asked a bout setting up a new ISA and received this reply:Hell, as long as the new account number was used as reference it will be with us in 2 hours.  You have up until the closure date of the account you opened to continue to fund.I don't appreciate the language used.

reviews.title: Jasmine was really helpful and quick to…
reviews.body: Jasmine was really helpful and quick to reply as sorted all my problems out efficiently

reviews.title: The service is always great and the…
reviews.body: The service is always great and the staff can’t do enough to help.

reviews.title: Helpful Advice from Skipton Building Society
reviews.body: I am not very confident at managing financial services online and was very grateful with the clear advice given on the Skipton chatline.  It helped make the process of changing from one account to another straightforward.

reviews.title: Everything was so well guided and easy.
reviews.body: Reply from Skipton Building Society

reviews.title: The Woking office excellent service
reviews.body: The Woking office has very knowledgeable and friendly staff demonstrating that the customer is a priority. Dealt with my needs in a very efficient manner.

reviews.title: Excellent Service
reviews.body: Good, efficient and professional.

reviews.title: Disappointing communication
reviews.body: As a potential new customer, it's sad when you can't even make an appointment. Tried to book appointment via head office at local branch. First available one in three weeks so put me through to branch. Told me if they don't answer in five minutes, you will get a call back. Two days later never did receive a call.

reviews.title: Concerns raised are met with a “brick wall" of denial and obfuscation
reviews.body: Most of the staff have very poor knowledge of the products and terms and conditions and as a result regularly give incorrect information when asked questions. When challenged, the staff prefer to argue “black is white” and answer questions different to those asked rather than admitting their errors, learning from them, apologising and moving on.This pattern is replicated in the complaints process which I can only describe as being “arrogant and inept”. Even when they are provided with evidence that eventually forces them to acknowledge they were wrong, this is done reluctantly and they still fail to provide unreserved apologies and an appropriate financial amount in recognition of the stress and inconvenience caused and time wasted.The aforementioned demonstrates an overall unacceptable attitude towards members and customers. Furthermore, based on problems with the terms and conditions etc and issues with technology it would appear that neither the legal department nor the IT department actually understand the business they are working in.I can see from other customer reviews that my experiences are not isolated. It is notable that all the negative reviews are responded to by asking the reviewer to contact them so the matter can be investigated and discussed further without recognising and acknowledging that is where they have already failed the customer!Unfortunately, the current Chief Executive prefers to side with staff who have given incorrect information and cover for their failings rather than supporting members and customers who are paying his salary. It is very sad that the Society, which is over 170 years old and historically has a good reputation, is failing its members and customers under the current management and staff. However, there is only one direction for a business that puts ineptitude and vested self-interest before its customers and ultimately the management and staff will pay the price for their failings.

reviews.title: Called into the branch to withdraw…
reviews.body: Called into the branch to withdraw £2000- not a large amount.  Was told I had to electronically transfer it to another bank, wait an hour & then  walk across town to get it at another bank.Wow - You couldn't have made the experience any worse.Could have made sense if it was a large amount, they also said - I could call in get £500 each day  over the next 4 days. Skipton - Wake Up !

reviews.title: Lauren was very helpful in my online…
reviews.body: Lauren was very helpful in my online chat

reviews.title: Southport store
reviews.body: From the moment I walked into the branch at Southport, I was made to feel welcome. The staff were all very helpful & friendly.

reviews.title: The little thoughtful things
reviews.body: They were so patient with the house sale going through. No hassle or pressure to buy a mortgage with them. Then we received this gift pack!! A magazine, tea, coffee, chocolates, hand wash, cleaning products and a pack of assorted nails. Gorgeous and thoughtful. Put a smile on our faces after a stressful move.

reviews.title: I am 88 years old and failed two simple…
reviews.body: I am 88 years old and failed two simple security questions.  Locked me out and required identification .  .I cannot supply. Not technically able. Live alone. No relatives.  Skipton not at all helpful or understanding of problems of being  old. Will not talk to me about my accounts. I find dealing with them very stressful.

reviews.title: My customer support (Lauren)was…
reviews.body: My customer support (Lauren)was extremely helpful & solved my issue quickly.

reviews.title: Just what I wanted.
reviews.body: I wanted to open a fixed rate bond to replace one which is about to mature with a different provider. I needed a better interest rate than that provider could provide. Skipton had a better rate which met my expectations and I have previous favourable experience with them. The process of opening the new account with Skipton was extremely straightforward and I am very pleased with their service.

reviews.title: Questions were answered in record time
reviews.body: Questions were answered in record time. Its easy to find and connect with customer services. Thankyou so much

reviews.title: straight forward and prompt advice
reviews.body: Reply from Skipton Building Society

reviews.title: Annie was great help
reviews.body: Annie, made this online banking manageable.... get patience and understanding we're first rate.Thanks Annie!@

reviews.title: The best company in the UK
reviews.body: The best company in the UK. We recommend it!

reviews.title: Skipton one-time passcode nightmare
reviews.body: Opened savings account and transferred money in no problem... Then noticed the website gave me no ability to get my money out without registering for a one-time passcode.  No end of problems...  (1) had to wait for post for one-time passcode (2) Tried to register code in website (3) Immediately failed saying I need to call them (4) Called them thinking they'd know about this - operative knew sweet nothing about it (5) operative reset request for one time passcode (poor solution) (6) Now waiting for another *** passcode (7) In meantime can't do anything but pay in!  Using post is a a ridiculous, slow, unreliable, antiquated and very frustrating method of authentication.  Wish I had'nt opened this account.

reviews.title: It was great being able to 'chat' to a…
reviews.body: It was great being able to 'chat' to a real person and not an infuriating chatbot. I spoke to Sean who was great. He dealt with my issue and resolved it fully. I have always had good experiences with Skipton staff. They offer good customer service and competitive interest rates. Great Building Society.

reviews.title: A lovely surprise receiving the welcome…
reviews.body: A lovely surprise receiving the welcome home pack!So many lovely gifts .. a very nice touch.Thank you.

reviews.title: good customer care
reviews.body: I have had two good customer care experiences with the Skipton Building Society recently, a very helpful phone call and a helpful online Chat. The customer care advisors picked up quickly and were helpful and professional.

reviews.title: Very good service and communication…
reviews.body: Very good service and communication from Skipton, would recommend.
